title: Settings
albumDriveDesc: Browse albums as a virtual drive in file manager (limited operations)
albumDriveMessageMountPointRequired: Please set the mount point first (e.g. K:\)
albumDriveOpenErrorHint: Try disabling and re-enabling the album drive in Settings.
imageAspectRatioDesc: Aspect ratio of image cards in gallery/albums
galleryColumnsDesc: Dynamic columns support shortcut adjustment; fixed columns disable shortcut
galleryPageSizeDesc: How many images to load per page in the gallery list (100, 500, or 1000)
galleryLayoutModeDesc: Grid uses fixed-aspect cells; Gallery stacks items into vertical columns with no gaps
imageObjectPositionDesc: When image overflows: center, top, or bottom (desktop only)
clearUserDataDesc: Delete all images, albums, tasks, settings, plugin configs. App will restart.
autoOpenWebViewDesc: Show and focus WebView window when starting WebView plugin
debugGenerateImagesDesc: Bulk clone existing image records for performance/pagination testing (dev only)
devWebViewDesc: Configure remote URL to open in standalone WebView (see CRAWLER_BACKENDS.md)
importRecommendedScheduleEnabledDesc: When importing a plugin preset run config, enable scheduling by default. If off, enable scheduling manually in the list.
pluginDefaultsDesc: Set default variables, HTTP headers, and output directory per installed plugin. When you pick a plugin in the crawl dialog or create an auto task, these values are applied first; incompatible fields fall back individually.
pluginDefaultsResetConfirm: Overwrite the current default config with values from the plugin config.json. Continue?
wallpaperRotationEnabledDesc: Rotate desktop wallpaper from selected album
wallpaperSelectAlbumDesc: Rotate from this album (or full gallery); set single wallpaper in gallery
wallpaperRotationIncludeSubalbumsDesc: When enabled, images from child albums are merged into the rotation pool. Each image ID is used only once (first occurrence in merge order).
wallpaperRotationModeDesc: Random: pick randomly; Sequential: cycle in order
wallpaperTransitionDesc: Window mode supports transitions; native follows system
wallpaperModeDesc: Native: system API; Window: standalone window (transitions, video, etc.)
maxConcurrentTasksDesc: Number of crawler tasks to run simultaneously (1–10). Reduce if you experience lag
defaultDownloadDirDesc: Used when task does not specify output (per-plugin subfolders)
defaultDownloadDirPlaceholder: Leave empty to use default location
fixedColumnsHint: Off: dynamic columns (shortcut); on: fixed 1–4 columns.
transitionRotationRequired: Rotation disabled: transition will apply when rotation is enabled
wallpaperModePluginConfirmMessage: Switching to plugin mode will change the system wallpaper plugin to Kabegame wallpaper plugin. Continue?
wallpaperModeWindowConfirmMessage: This media requires window mode to be set as wallpaper. Switch to window mode?
wallpaperModeConfirmMessage: Switching to native will overwrite system wallpaper. Continue?
wallpaperModeSwitchTimeout: Mode switch timeout: no response in 30s
debugTipsLine1: Dev only; bulk insert into SQLite (unique id).
debugTipsLine2: Large count may take time; refresh gallery to see result.
debugConfirmMessage:
Generate {count} test records (database only, no files).

Continue?
clearDataConfirmMessage:
This will delete:
• All images and thumbnails
• All albums
• All tasks
• All settings
• All plugin configs

App will restart after. This cannot be undone!
clearDataFinalMessage:
Are you sure you want to clear all user data?
App will restart and all data will be lost!
weDirPlaceholder: Import to WE (e.g. WE install dir or projects/myprojects)
quickEmpty: No quick settings on this page
